title: The Pursuit of Glory: The Five Revolutions That Made Modern Europe: 1648-1815 (Unabridged)
description: Between the end of the Thirty Years' War and the Battle of Waterloo, Europe underwent an extraordinary transformation that saw five of the modern world's great revolutions - scientific, industrial, American, French, and romantic....
